name: Hamilton RPG!
description: Start or already live a life in New York City! This rpg takes place in the Hamilton MUSICAL not in the actual real life, if you want a bot like that just ask! You can either start in New York with relationships and social standing or you can have just moved there, it’s all up to you! (This is supposed to be before Eliza and Hamilton marry so before Philip is born but they can be however old you want and you can make it however you want!)
creator: Cake_upyomama
